file_insights.changes_summary: Replaced stub cmd_retry_transient implementation with full working version supporting single card and batch retries of transient failures
key_additions: is_transient_failure() helper function detecting transient failures via exit code 75, failure_reason patterns, and stderr log analysis
Single card retry path with validation that card is in failed state
Batch retry path scanning root/failed and team-*/failed directories
Metadata updates: retry_count increment, failure_reason and exit_code clearing, stage status reset
Team-aware directory path logic preserving team-* structure during failed→pending move
Lineage event logging and thumbnail re-rendering on successful retry

patterns_discovered.description: Multi-level detection: exit code 75 (rate limit) → failure_reason field pattern matching → stderr log last line analysis
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables accurate classification of retryable vs permanent failures

patterns_discovered.description: When moving failed cards back to pending, code detects team-* parent directories and preserves team-specific pending/ subdirectories
patterns_discovered.significance: Maintains team isolation and directory hierarchy during state transitions

patterns_discovered.description: Batch mode continues processing all cards even on individual failures; single-card mode fails fast with context
patterns_discovered.significance: Different error semantics for CLI operations: batch is lenient, single-card is strict

patterns_discovered.description: Write meta to disk BEFORE filesystem rename, ensuring consistency if crash occurs
patterns_discovered.significance: Prevents orphaned cards with stale metadata

patterns_discovered.description: Uses saturating_add(1) for retry_count to prevent integer overflow
patterns_discovered.significance: Defensive programming against pathological retry scenarios

gotchas_discovered.context: Code references TRANSIENT_PATTERNS in two locations but constant is not defined in this diff
gotchas_discovered.impact: Suggests constant is defined in parent scope or imported; requires verification it exists

gotchas_discovered.context: Code to determine target pending directory (checking team-* hierarchy) is duplicated twice in the function
gotchas_discovered.impact: Code bloat and maintenance risk if path logic changes

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Single-card mode fails without retry confirmation
gotchas_discovered.context: If a specific card ID is provided but is not in failed state, function bails immediately
gotchas_discovered.impact: No retry attempt made; user must understand state transitions

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Meta read after rename in lineage event logging
gotchas_discovered.context: Code re-reads meta from target path after rename for lineage logging, doubling I/O
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unnecessary file system operation; meta object already in memory

approach_outcome.summary: Complete implementation of cmd_retry_transient replacing stub with 291 lines of working code
capabilities_added: Classify failed cards as transient or permanent via exit code and log patterns
Retry individual failed cards by ID with state validation
Batch retry all transient failures in failed/ directories
Preserve team-based directory structure during state transitions
Update metadata (retry_count, clear failure markers, reset stages)
Maintain consistency via lineage logging and thumbnail updates
Provide user feedback with emoji indicators and reason logging
approach_outcome.test_coverage: Inferred from implementation; no explicit test additions in diff

recommendations.item: Verify TRANSIENT_PATTERNS constant is defined and accessible
recommendations.rationale: Code will not compile if constant is missing; critical blocker

recommendations.item: Extract duplicate path resolution logic into a helper function
recommendations.rationale: Reduces duplication from ~20 lines to 1 call; improves maintainability

recommendations.item: Avoid re-reading meta from disk for lineage logging
recommendations.rationale: Meta object is already in memory after write; re-read is unnecessary I/O
recommendations.suggestion: Pass updated meta object directly to lineage event builder

recommendations.item: Add documentation for transient failure patterns
recommendations.rationale: Users and maintainers should understand what triggers transient retry logic

recommendations.item: Consider adding --dry-run flag for batch retry
recommendations.rationale: Would allow users to preview which cards would be retried before executing
